patterns_discovered.testing_approach: Integration test pattern with comprehensive mocking using Mocktail
patterns_discovered.test_organization: Logical grouping by authentication scenarios (login, refresh, persistence, error handling)
patterns_discovered.mocking_strategy: Comprehensive dependency mocking for isolated component testing
patterns_discovered.async_testing: Async testing with proper timeout handling for network operations
patterns_discovered.error_scenario_testing: Systematic testing of error states and recovery mechanisms
patterns_discovered.lifecycle_testing: Testing of app restart scenarios and session restoration

gotchas_discovered: Complex state management across multiple auth components during testing
Proper mocking of token refresh services with exponential backoff
Session persistence testing requires secure storage simulation
Offline/online transition testing requires connectivity mocking
Error state propagation through the entire auth chain
Token expiration threshold (75%) testing precision requirements
Integration testing requires careful ordering of dependent operations

approach_outcome.strategy: Systematic E2E test creation with comprehensive coverage of all auth flows
approach_outcome.implementation_quality: High - All acceptance criteria met with 807 lines of comprehensive tests
features_delivered: Complete login flow testing with session creation
Token refresh during API calls with retry logic verification
Session restoration after app restart (valid/recently expired/old sessions)
Logout and re-login scenarios with proper state management
Offline to online transitions with sync on reconnection
Integration testing of all auth components (AuthRepository, TokenRefreshService, TokenExpirationTracker, TokenRefreshScheduler, PersistentSessionManager, OfflineAuthManager, AuthProvider)
approach_outcome.test_coverage: >85% comprehensive coverage of all authentication scenarios

recommendations: Maintain the comprehensive E2E test structure for future auth feature additions
Consider adding performance benchmarks for token refresh operations
Implement automated test execution in CI/CD pipeline
Add integration tests for edge cases like rapid token expiration
Consider property-based testing for auth state transitions
Document the test architecture onboarding for new team members
Regularly review and update tests when auth flows change
